sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (feat1 Float64, feat2 Float64, feat3 Float64);
UPDATE test_table SET feat2 = feat2 * 2 WHERE feat1 < 5.0;
SELECT feat1, feat2, catboostEvaluate('/path/to/model.bin', feat1, feat2) AS prediction FROM test_table;
SELECT SUM(catboostEvaluate('/path/to/model.bin', feat1, feat2)) AS total_prediction FROM test_table;
